programme.desc: S1 E41 Gopi and Rashi, cousins, are married into the same wealthy family. As they strive to cope with family relations, they also attempt to become better versions of themselves.

programme.desc: S1 E183 Overcome with deep emotions, Akshara breaks down in tears as she prays in the morning, reflecting on her profound moments.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.desc: S1 E2043 Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
